MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON DEC-08-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RACHEL WALKER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
